Bash(python -c " import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\) import pandas as pd, glob csv = sorted\(glob.glob\('data/processed/*.csv'\)\)[-1] df = pd.read_csv\(csv\) df = df[pd.to_numeric\(df['tourism_num'], errors='coerce'\).notna\(\)] n_total = len\(df\) - 30 # 减去 look_back test_size = int\(n_total * 0.10\) trainval = n_total - test_size val_size = int\(trainval * 0.111\) train_size = trainval - val_size print\(f'total windows: {n_total}'\) print\(f'train: {train_size}, val: {val_size}, test: {test_size}'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import json, glob, os files = sorted\(glob.glob\('output/runs/*/runs/*/metrics.json'\)\) for f in files: d = json.load\(open\(f\)\) reg = d.get\('regression'\) or {} sw = d.get\('suitability_warning'\) or {} sww = d.get\('suitability_warning_weighted'\) or {} name = os.path.normpath\(f\).split\(os.sep\)[2] mae=reg.get\('mae',0\); rmse=reg.get\('rmse',0\); mape=reg.get\('mape',0\) f1=sw.get\('f1',0\); prec=sw.get\('precision',0\); rec=sw.get\('recall',0\); brier=sw.get\('brier',0\) f1w=sww.get\('f1_weighted',0\); recw=sww.get\('recall_weighted',0\) wf='YES' if d.get\('walk_forward'\) else 'NO' print\(name, '| MAE=%.0f RMSE=%.0f MAPE=%.1f%% | F1=%.3f Rec=%.3f Brier=%.4f | F1_w=%.3f Rec_w=%.3f | WF=%s' % \(mae,rmse,mape if mape>1 else mape*100,f1,rec,brier,f1w,recw,wf\)\) ")
